description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job called pages that runs in the default stage, sets the variable GIT_DEPTH to 1, runs the shell commands `mkdir .public`, `cp -r * .public/`, and `mv .public public`, and publishes the `public/` directory as an artifact. The job uses the default GitLab runner image and has no additional services or rules, so it executes on every pipeline run.
